ct_a1: You can cancel at any time from your account → Subscription → Cancel. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. If you cancel during the 14-day trial, no charge is made.
ct_a2: From your dashboard → Appointments → Connect Google Calendar. You will be redirected to Google to authorize access. Once connected, the AI will automatically check your availability for appointment requests.
ct_a3: Yes, like any AI assistant, LocalReply can sometimes give imprecise answers, particularly on topics not configured in your settings. We recommend completing your FAQ as precisely as possible. For unanswered questions, the AI alerts you rather than guessing.
ct_a4: Yes. You can switch between Standard and Pro (or vice versa) at any time from your account. For upgrades, the difference is prorated. For downgrades, the credit is applied to the next invoice.
ct_a5: Yes. All communications are encrypted via HTTPS/TLS. Sensitive tokens (Google Calendar) are encrypted in the database. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for commercial purposes.
ct_a6: LocalReply natively supports 8 languages: French, English, German, Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, Dutch and Polish. Detection is automatic from the customer's first message — no configuration needed.
ct_a7: At the end of the 14-day trial, your subscription to the chosen plan is automatically activated and your card is charged. You will receive a reminder email 3 days before the trial ends. If you cancel before, no charge is made.
ct_email_desc: For any question about your account, subscription or platform usage.
ct_faq_sub: Answers to the most common questions.
ct_feedback_desc: An idea to improve LocalReply? We read all feedback and integrate it into the roadmap.
ct_notfound_desc: We reply personally. Not a chatbot — a real person.
ct_q1: How do I cancel my subscription?
ct_q2: How do I connect my Google Calendar?
ct_q3: Can the AI make mistakes in its answers?
ct_q4: Can I change my plan at any time?
ct_q7: What happens at the end of the free trial?
ct_response_time: Response time: less than 48h on weekdays.
ct_status_desc: LocalReply API · AI Assistant · Google Calendar · Emails — Everything working normally.
ct_sub: A question, a problem or a suggestion? We reply quickly.
ct_support_desc: For urgent questions or technical issues requiring a quick response.
